title: Lesson 249: (Grammar) - too; also; in addition; as well; (not) either (in ...

intro_cards.title: も: Emphasis on Quantity / Extent
intro_cards.body:
This use of も emphasizes degree or quantity — 'a whole ~' / 'as many as ~' / 'not even.'

Emphasizing large quantity (often with surprise):
• 3時間も待った！(I waited a whole 3 hours!)
• 100人も来た。(As many as 100 people came!)
• 10キロも走った。(I ran a whopping 10 kilometers!)

With negatives = 'not even one':
• 一つもない。(There isn't even one.)
• 何も食べなかった。(I didn't eat anything.)
• 一円もない。(I don't have a single yen.)
